# seerr_notification_webpush (Data Source)

Read Seerr webpush notification settings via /api/v1/settings/notifications/webpush.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `embed_poster` (Boolean)
- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `notification_types` (Set of String)
- `webpush` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--webpush))
